questions.q: What was the codename of the 7+ year in-development title that Eidos Montreal recently canceled, leading to significant layoffs?
questions.correctText: Eidos Montreal canceled a project codenamed 'Wildlands' (also known as P11) that had been in development for over seven years and cost hundreds of millions of dollars.

questions.q: Which game, featuring iconic Nintendo and Sega characters, was recently delisted from the Nintendo Switch eShop in various regions?
options: Mario & Sonic at the Olympic Games Tokyo 2020
questions.correctText: Mario & Sonic at the Olympic Games Tokyo 2020 was delisted from the Nintendo Switch eShop in North America, Australia, and Japan.

questions.q: Which survival game recently released its fifth and final episode of the Wintermute story mode, 'The Light at the End of All Things,' almost a decade after its initial early access launch?
questions.correctText: The Long Dark released 'The Light at the End of All Things,' its fifth and final episode of the Wintermute story mode, almost a decade after the game's initial launch.

questions.q: Build a Rocket Boy's CEO, Mark Gerhard, recently claimed that a new mission in which of their games would include evidence of alleged sabotage?
questions.correctText: Build a Rocket Boy CEO Mark Gerhard announced a new mission for MindsEye, titled 'Blacklist,' which he claims will feature evidence of alleged sabotage against the game.

questions.q: What new Pokémon game, released in March 2026, is credited with significantly increasing Nintendo Switch 2 sales in the UK?
questions.correctText: Nintendo Switch 2 sales in the UK more than doubled following the release of Pokémon Pokopia in March 2026.
